sender_name: Pollen Tech Supply Chain Solutions Team
sender_description: Supply chain solutions company helping FMCG brands recover value from excess inventory in Southeast Asia and India
qualifier_context: Pollen Tech helps FMCG brands stop losing money on excess inventory. We're FMCG-specific, connected to real demand, and enterprise-proven. Reach out for a structured solution to your write-off problem.
ideal_customer_profile: Mid-to-large Fortune 500 companies in Southeast Asia and India facing inventory issues
what_we_offer: Lily AI-powered liquidation management system that automates clearance, connects brands with verified B2B buyers, and reduces working capital tied up in excess inventory
strong_signals: Operational triggers: packaging refresh, product discontinuation, distributor termination, post-campaign overstock
Organizational triggers: new Supply Chain Director or Head of Operations, demand planning or S&OP role being hired, regional restructuring or market exit
Financial triggers: earnings commentary mentioning inventory provisions or write-off increases, public statements about working capital optimization
weak_signals: General supply chain concerns or cost-saving initiatives without clear inventory implications
